who: procurement managers in small to medium-sized retail businesses processing 10–50 invoices/month
offer: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized retail businesses processing 10–50 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We streamline the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation processes using spreadsheets.
problem: manual reconciliation of vendor invoices with purchase orders is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers seeking solutions
Indie Hackers discussions on similar reconciliation challenges
DM outreach to procurement managers with a demo video
Engage in community forums for procurement tools sharing
try_it: Let users try weekly summary email reports and a dashboard for tracking discrepancies
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showcasing the manual-first workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
